case.scenario: Later evidence weakens an earlier inference
case.notice: Entirely fictional. No real person, clinic record, recording, or contact data is included.

source_packets.label: Immediate response
source_packets.content: After a pacing cue, the practitioner recorded three smoother repetitions than the preceding three. No repeat set was performed at that time.

source_packets.label: Later retest
source_packets.content: In a later set under the same cue, the smoother pattern did not repeat and two pauses were recorded. No reason for the difference was tested.

suggested_answers.repeat-test-recorded: No. It was an immediate within-session observation only, and no repeat set had yet been performed.
suggested_answers.between-set-change: No other between-set change was recorded. The reason for the difference remains unknown.
